pilot_note: User-supplied category 'REG' corrected. Data Privacy Officer is in GOV (WIDAI-GOV-0016). REG category contains EU AI Act implementation roles, not GDPR privacy officers.
strm_coverage: EU AI Act (62/62 FDE IDs scored; 50 KSAs at strength ≥3; 1 at strength=10, 30 at strength=8). Note: EU AI Act STRM is a secondary signal for DPO — primary KSA evidence is GDPR/CCPA/IAPP-sourced from web research.

records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 DPO/Data Privacy Officer JDs: GDPR Articles 37-39 compliance, CCPA, HIPAA, Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs), privacy risk assessment, IT security knowledge, encryption and data security, privacy-enhancing technologies (PETs), supervisory authority liaison, staff training, cross-functional leadership, ISO-27701, IAPP CIPM certification preferred. Sources: IAPP 2025 Salary Report, Workable GDPR DPO JD, ComplyDog, Cybersecurity Guide, Coursera. Specific: Security assessment is a core DPO competency — GDPR Art 32 requires appropriate technical/organizational measures.
records.inclusion_rationale: DPO must conduct or commission security assessments for data processing systems — EU AI Act STRM confirms this as a top-strength mapping.
records.adversarial_challenge: Security assessments may be a CISO or security team function.
records.adversarial_resolution: DPO is accountable for appropriateness of security measures under GDPR — assessment is a DPO accountability regardless of who executes.

records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 DPO/Data Privacy Officer JDs: GDPR Articles 37-39 compliance, CCPA, HIPAA, Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs), privacy risk assessment, IT security knowledge, encryption and data security, privacy-enhancing technologies (PETs), supervisory authority liaison, staff training, cross-functional leadership, ISO-27701, IAPP CIPM certification preferred. records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 DPO/Data Privacy Officer JDs: GDPR Articles 37-39 compliance, CCPA, HIPAA, Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs), privacy risk assessment, IT security knowledge, encryption and data security, privacy-enhancing technologies (PETs), supervisory authority liaison, staff training, cross-functional leadership, ISO-27701, IAPP CIPM certification preferred.
